title: EQ - Select a value, close the Settings screen, reopen it - the selected value persists
scenario: EQ setting persists after navigating away from and back to Device Settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Select an EQ value (e.g., Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ).
5. Tap the back button or navigate away from the Equalizer screen to return to Device Settings.
6. Close the Settings screen entirely (e.g., press back or home to exit the app).
7. Re-open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate back to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
8. Observe the currently selected EQ value.
9. Repeat steps 4–8 for each of the remaining EQ values (Bass, Flat, Bright, Custom EQ).
expected: The previously selected EQ value (Bass, Flat, Bright, or Custom EQ) persists and is shown as selected when returning to the Equalizer settings.
